description: Obscure edge case (tests no_matches tool path)

input.text: We need to integrate Potens with our on-prem AS/400 mainframe running OS/400 V4R5 using a custom SOAP endpoint. Is there a specific WSDL we should use for this legacy connection?

tool_output.note: No policies matched category='technical' with keywords=['SOAP endpoint', 'AS/400 mainframe', 'WSDL', 'legacy connection']. This may indicate an unusual issue type. Consider lowering confidence.

tool_input.description: Integrate Potens with on-prem AS/400 mainframe using custom SOAP endpoint

tickets.description: Our Potens API integration is returning 503 errors intermittently. It happens about 30% of the time. We're using the v2 REST API with the /analytics endpoint. This is affecting our production pipeline
tickets.resolution: The /analytics endpoint was hitting a rate limit on the upstream data provider. Increased the rate limit for enterprise-tier API keys and added better error messages. Customer's pipeline stabilized within 1 hour of the fix.

tickets.description: Is there a way to integrate Potens with Slack for notifications? We'd like to get alerts in our #engineering channel when certain events happen in the dashboard.
tickets.resolution: Informed the customer about the existing webhook feature that can be used with Slack's incoming webhooks. Sent documentation link. Also logged the native Slack integration as a feature request in the backlog.

tickets.description: Customer cannot log in to the Potens admin dashboard after resetting their password. They are getting an 'invalid credentials' error even with the new password. Tried clearing cookies and using incogn
tickets.resolution: The password reset token had expired due to a caching issue in the auth service. Invalidated all sessions and forced a fresh password reset. Customer regained access within 20 minutes.

tool_input.summary: Enterprise customer needs integration with legacy AS/400 mainframe using custom SOAP endpoint
